popularStory.headline: Wladyslaw Herman of Poland (d 1102) Bio Sketch
popularStory.description:
BIO:  King of Poland, 1079-1100.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/POLAND.htm#WladislawIHermandied1102
WŁADYSŁAW HERMAN of Poland, son of KAZIMIERZ I KAROL "Odnowiciel/the Renewer" Prince of Po …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I於1043年出生在波蘭時，他的父親Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast27歲，母親Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna32歲。他於大約1080年與Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1102年6月11日在波蘭馬左維次吉沃可享年59歲，埋葬在波蘭馬左維次吉沃可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I于1043年出生在波兰时，他的父亲Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast27岁，母亲Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna32岁。他于大约1080年与Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1102年6月11日在波兰馬左維次吉沃可享年59岁，埋葬在波兰馬左維次吉沃可。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Polen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch (Van Polen): ethnic name for a Pole or nickname for someone with some other connection with Poland, from Polen ‘Poland’.
Possibly also Irish: variant of   Polin  .

variants.name: Polin
meanings: Irish (counties Armagh and Down): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Póilín, a patronymic from a personal name formed from a pet form of Pól (see Paul ).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Poland, from a Slavicized form of German Polen ‘Poland’.

nameMeanings.name: Herman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hermann , from a Germanic personal name derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. The name was in use among the Normans and was borne by many immigrants from the Low Countries in the 15th century. Perhaps because of that it continued in occasional use well into the 1700s. It was revived more generally in Britain in the 19th century, when it also became common in America, most probably as a result of the influence of German immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I was born in 1043, in Poland, his father, Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast, was 27 and his mother, Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, was 32. He married Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna about 1080. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 June 1102, in Płock, Masovia, Poland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Płock, Masovia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I est né en 1043, à Pologne, son père, Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1102, à Płock, mazowieckie, Pologne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Płock, mazowieckie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I 1043 in Polen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast 27 und seine Mutter Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna 32. Er hat um 1080 Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juni 1102 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Płock, Masowien, Polen und wurde in Płock, Masowien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I è nato il nel 1043 nel Polonia, il suo padre, Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna circa 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1102, nel Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Wladyslaw Herman von Polen Iが1043年にポーランドで生まれた時，父Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piastは27歳，母Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovnaは32歳であった。約1080年にJudita Grojčská Přemyslovnaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1102年6月11日にポーランドマゾウィエクイプlオックで59歳で死去し，ポーランドマゾウィエクイプlオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I(이)가 1043년 폴란드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1102년 6월 11일 폴란드 마즈위키 pl옥크에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 마즈위키 pl옥크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I nasceu em 1043, em Polônia, seu pai, Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1102, em Płock, mazowieckie, Polônia, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Płock, mazowieckie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I родился в 1043 г. в местности Польша, его отцу по имени Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 июня 1102 г. в местности Плоцкий повят, мазоуиекки, Польша в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Плоцк, мазоуиекки, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wladyslaw Herman von Polen I nació en 1043, en Polonia, su papá, Kazimierz Karol Odnowiciel Piast, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Dobroniega Maria Vladimirovna, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Judita Grojčská Přemyslovna aproximadamente 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1102, en Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia.
